title: NVPack
description: A mid-weight modpack designed to make the game more about technology and economy for my small server.
body:
![Alt Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e4e3d11bd78c281dfd8aa1bd87488101802dbef_0.webp)

The NVPack aims to make Minecraft a well optimized game for mid end pc's and to let players live out their creative side with the Create mod.

The modpack is also made to be used in a server so it includes proximity voice chat, letting people claim chunks and forceload them so they can automate everything they need, and to make all of this easier, the sifter mod lets you generate all the resources you need. 
The pack also contains mods which lets people play on lan if they dont wanna mess with slow free servers.

It is recommended to allocate 8 gigs of ram for the modpack and use Java 21 with the following JVM Args: 
```
-XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational
```

<details>
<summary>Included Shaders</summary>

- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders/version/8.2.09)
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
- [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)
- [Solas](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader)


</details>
